sanitized_advisory_excerpt.recovery_rationale: Merchant m001 has reported being sold out during the demo-night-tour. To maintain visitor experience, alternative nearby merchants or a restocking schedule may be considered. Organizer approval is required before any restocking or route adjustment is made.
sanitized_advisory_excerpt.visitor_safe_notice_draft: One of our tour merchants has reached capacity for the evening. Please explore other participating vendors nearby. Thank you for your understanding.
sanitized_advisory_excerpt.safety_notes: No immediate safety concern. Merchant remains open for general questions but cannot serve additional customers tonight. Organizer must approve any changes to merchant participation or inventory replenishment.
